revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初九]][[zh:八月初九]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 9|qq=August 9}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 4th year / {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu|1=Jianwu}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1335|en|1335|qid=Q6011|lt=1335|1=1335}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} was appointed as the General of the Eastern Expedition to defeat {{ill|Hōjō Tokiyuki|en|Hōjō Tokiyuki|qid=Q5965196|lt=Hōjō Tokiyuki|1=Hōjō Tokiyuki}}.{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}}) – The Meiji government issued a Daijōkan edict permitting the cutting of hair and the abolition of the sword ban. == Births == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|qid=Q19739|lt=1192|1=1192}} {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Sanetomo|en|Minamoto no Sanetomo|qid=Q174249|lt=Minamoto no Sanetomo|1=Minamoto no Sanetomo}}, the 3rd Shōgun of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (died {{ill|1219|en|1219|qid=Q5388|lt=1219|1=1219}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}}) – {{ill|Hayashi Ariyoshi|ja|早矢仕有的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayashi Ariyoshi|1=Hayashi Yūteki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11511463}} (also known as Maruya Zenshichi), an entrepreneur and founder of {{ill|Maruzen|ja|丸善|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maruzen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to マルゼン|1=Maruzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11341311}} (died {{ill|1901|en|1901|qid=Q2035|lt=1901|1=1901}}). * (In the same Tenpō year) – In Tenpō 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|qid=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}}), {{ill|Tanaka Yoshio|en|Tanaka Yoshio|qid=Q11575905|lt=Tanaka Yoshio|1=Tanaka Yoshio}}, a naturalist, was born (died {{ill|1916|en|1916|qid=Q2087|lt=1916|1=1916}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|qid=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|456|en|456|qid=Q30432|lt=456|1=456}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|qid=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō|1=Emperor Ankō}}, the 20th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}. * {{ill|Sutoku|ja|崇徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sutoku|1=Chongde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1077567}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1643|en|1643|qid=Q6917|lt=1643|1=1643}} {{ill|September 21|en|September 21|qid=Q2891|lt=September 21|1=September 21}}) – {{ill|Hong Taiji|ja|皇太極|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hong Taiji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ホンタイジ|1=Hong Taiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q296367}} (also rendered as Hon Tai-ji), the 2nd Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|qid=Q8733|lt=Qing dynasty|1=Qing dynasty}} (died {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|8|8|10|7|9|9|8|0809|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
